Class Loan

java.lang.Object
loans.Loan
public class Loan extends Object
Represents a loan that has been placed by someone for something.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Loan(String name, String publisher, String loanedTo, LocalDate due)
    Creates a new loan.

    Get when the loan is due.

    Retrieve who the item was loaned to.

  • Constructor Details

    • Loan

      public Loan(String name, String publisher, String loanedTo, LocalDate due)
      Creates a new loan.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the loaned item. Must not be blank.
      publisher - The publisher of the loaned item. Can be empty.
      loanedTo - The person that the item was loaned to. Must not be blank.
      due - When the loan is due for return. Must not be blank.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Retrieves the name of the loaned item.
      Returns:
      The name of the loaned item.

    • getPublisher

      public String getPublisher()
      Retrieves the publisher of the loaned item.
      Returns:
      The publisher.

    • getLoanedTo

      public String getLoanedTo()
      Retrieve who the item was loaned to.
      Returns:
      Name of the loaned-to person.

    • getDue

      public LocalDate getDue()
      Get when the loan is due.
      Returns:
      The due date.

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
